distractors.off_target_set: Decisions where intuition is known reliable; situations where deliberation is clearly superior; time-critical decisions requiring immediate System 1 response; meta-questions about dual-process theory
distractors.description: Items where the System 1/System 2 distinction adds no value — either intuition is clearly appropriate, or deliberation is clearly required

decision_gate.elevate: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_delta_pp >= 5 AND replication_paired_test_p < 0.05 AND replication_direction_matches_primary AND format_length_control_pass
decision_gate.directional_not_replicated: primary_delta_pp >= 5 AND paired_test_p < 0.05 AND (replication_delta_pp < 5 OR replication_paired_test_p >= 0.05 OR replication_direction_opposite)
